message:
feat(core,pager,vdbe): explicit concurrent round tests, WAL adapter sync policy wiring, pager read-only improvements, VDBE instrumentation

Core connection:
- Add test_explicit_concurrent_rounds_single_connection_preserve_increment_base
  verifying sequential BEGIN CONCURRENT rounds preserve increment base
- Additional connection-level refinements for schema refresh paths

WAL adapter:
- Wire WAL commit sync policy through the adapter layer for configurable
  per-commit vs deferred sync behavior

Pager:
- Extend read-only pager path with additional validation and trait support
- Add WalCommitSyncPolicy trait method declarations

VDBE engine:
- Expand cold-state tracking instrumentation to additional opcode paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
